title: Align provenance draft guard with ratified exportability contract
intent: Correct a stale governance test that asserted ProvenanceAttachmentDraft.is_exportable() is always false even for RATIFIED attachments. Production code and the R2 governed-save wrapper already define RATIFIED as the only exportable provenance attachment state while export_authorized remains false on the draft structure.
behavior_change: none - test-only correction. No production code changes; the test now matches the existing ProvenanceAttachmentDraft.is_exportable() implementation and R2 wrapper behavior.

diff_articulation.what_changed: Split the stale RATIFIED exportability assertion into two focused invariants: non-ratified statuses in NON_EXPORTABLE_STATUSES remain non-exportable, and a RATIFIED ProvenanceAttachmentDraft returns is_exportable() True while export_authorized remains False. This preserves the blocked/draft/pending guard while aligning the RATIFIED case with production behavior.
diff_articulation.why_not_redundant: The old assertion contradicted services/api/app/governance/provenance_attachment.py::ProvenanceAttachmentDraft.is_exportable(), which returns True exactly when status == RATIFIED. Existing R2 export provenance tests also rely on ratified attachments building a compatible governed-save context. This PR does not authorize blocked drafts or alter export_authorized; it only repairs the stale test expectation.

commands_run: PYTHONPATH=services/api py -3.11 -m pytest tests/governance/test_provenance_attachment_draft.py services/api/tests/test_dxf_lifecycle_ibg_provenance_guards.py services/api/tests/test_ibg_export_provenance.py -q -> 29 passed, 3 existing NumPy reload warnings
py -3.11 scripts/ci/check_cbsp21_gate.py --manifest .cbsp21/patch_input.json --changed-files <final PR file set> -> pass, 100% manifest coverage
py -3.11 -m app.ci.check_complexity --baseline app/ci/complexity_baseline.json -> pass, no functions exceed complexity 15

files.intent: Align RATIFIED is_exportable() expectations with current production/R2 contract while preserving non-ratified non-exportability.
files.behavior_change: none - test-only correction for existing behavior

files.intent: Declare the stale guard-test correction for CBSP21 manifest gates.
